name: Rigged Recount Racket
text:
Whenever a player votes or a vote is held, you may sacrifice a Favor token. If you do, you cast that player's vote however you like, then quietly ask for a recount. The recount agrees with you.
The ballots all came back marked in the same goblin handwriting. Nobody mentioned it.
flavorText: Democracy is too important to leave to the voters.
